command:
bash -lc 'missing=(); for k in M066_S05_REPO M066_S05_REVIEW_OUTPUT_KEY GITHUB_APP_ID; do if test -n "${!k:-}"; then printf "%s=set
" "$k"; else printf "%s=unset
" "$k"; missing+=("$k"); fi; done; if test -n "${GITHUB_PRIVATE_KEY:-}" || test -n "${GITHUB_PRIVATE_KEY_BASE64:-}"; then printf "GITHUB_PRIVATE_KEY_OR_BASE64=set
"; else printf "GITHUB_PRIVATE_KEY_OR_BASE64=unset
"; fi; if test -n "${M066_S05_DELIVERY_ID:-}"; then printf "M066_S05_DELIVERY_ID=set
"; else printf "M066_S05_DELIVERY_ID=unset
"; fi'

rg -n "M066_S05|action-mention-format-suggestions|m066_s05_ok|formatter Pull Request Review|Formatter Pull Request Review URL|Suggestion comment URL|Delivery ID|Review output key|deployed revision" docs README.md package.json scripts/verify-m066-s05.ts scripts/verify-m066-s05.test.ts

command: bash -lc 'start=$(date +%s%3N); test -n "${M066_S05_REPO:-}" && test -n "${M066_S05_REVIEW_OUTPUT_KEY:-}" && case "$M066_S05_REVIEW_OUTPUT_KEY" in *action-mention-format-suggestions*) code=0 ;; *) echo "M066_S05_REVIEW_OUTPUT_KEY must be a mention-format-suggestions key" >&2; code=1 ;; esac; code=${code:-$?}; end=$(date +%s%3N); echo "EXIT_CODE=$code DURATION_MS=$((end-start))"; exit "$code"'
outputSnippet:
EXIT_CODE=1 DURATION_MS=1


Command exited with code 1

command: bash -lc 'start=$(date +%s%3N); rg -n "PR URL|reviewOutputKey|formatter review|suggestion comment|verify:m066:s05|mention-format-suggestions|deployed revision" docs/smoke/m066-formatter-suggestions.md; code=$?; end=$(date +%s%3N); echo "EXIT_CODE=$code DURATION_MS=$((end-start))"; exit "$code"'
outputSnippet: 18:The live smoke was not accepted because this task session did not have a real captured formatter-suggestion delivery bundle to verify. No PR review URL, suggestion comment URL, deployed revision, or `m066_s05_ok` verifier output was available in tracked artifacts or ambient task context.
